productDisplayName: Lotto Men Green Surf Island Flip Flop
description: Style Note Slip into unparalleled comfort in these flip flops from lotto. With soft straps and a cushioned footbed, this flip flop comes with an arty upper that makes it a stylish buy. Product Details Green flip flop with thong style textured synthetic straps with branding appliqued on the strap and a fabric toe separator Soft and textured footbed with cool print Durable rubber outsole with ergonomically styled grooves and branded lugs for absolute grip and traction Material and Care Rubber Wipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust Do not store in direct sunlight
